## DONE + live-verified (2026-07-01)
Landed via Gerrit change 123 (-> GitHub main d96628c9).
- infra/terraform-github/main.tf: main-only (tag_lock removed), check block -> fail-closed
  lifecycle precondition on main_lock. Stale 18048287 comment reconciled (actual legacy deleted:
  18306946).
- Live reconcile: terraform init (S3 backend) + terraform import github_repository_ruleset.main_lock
  rebar:18402431; 'terraform plan' -> 'No changes. Your infrastructure matches the configuration.'
  (re-verified clean after the a774 drift test).
- terraform validate: Success. Contractual test tests/unit/test_mirror_lock_terraform.py (3 tests):
  main-only, precondition-not-check, full lock contract. All pass.
